notes: Two fixes. (1) The MegaBugs page no longer crashes on the All / In Progress filters — a ticket with an out-of-range priority now falls back to Normal instead of taking the whole page down. (2) The Steam Cloud sync indicator was inverted: it said 'ready to launch' while Steam was still uploading your save, then flipped to 'syncing' a few seconds after the upload had already finished. It now reads Steam's cloud log and only blocks launch while an upload is genuinely in flight. Tickets 20260601-224125-5c500f68 and 20260525-232101-762605a1.
